name: yamtam-engine
tagline: Personal agent operating system — safety hooks, memory, agents, cross-engine hard enforcement for Claude Code
highlights: 45 safety hooks — blocks rm -rf, force push, prod deploys, unscoped DB ops, pipe-to-shell; circuit breaker at 5 stuck calls + static analysis, test runner, dependency safety, coverage gates
90 agents across root and domain subfolders (quality, security, infra, data-ai, orchestration, forge)

387 skills — frontend, backend, IaC, AI/LLM, security, multi-agent, distributed systems, ML infra, K8s, WebAssembly, Chrome DevTools, LangFuse, Qdrant, Portkey, Outlines, DeepEval, Ollama, code quality
61 rules — sovereignty tiers (GUEST/OPERATOR/SOVEREIGN), advanced jailbreak defense, supply chain vetting, circuit breaker law
Cross-engine hard enforcement — Cursor, Aider, and Copilot route all bash through safe-run.sh proxy
L1 Atomic Memory — persistent facts with confidence levels and tag search; expiry sweep via sweep-expired-facts.sh
826 checks: 65 hook + 678 skill trigger (369/369 coverage) + red-team scenarios + command smoke
Identity Gate — Tier 0/1/2 auth with SHA-256 hash verification, auto-auth from env var
Truth Gate (L3) — warns on claim verbs without evidence
